electricity.notes: EIA Electricity Monthly (Apr 2026). Industrial rate. Sensitivity test recommended for Virginia GS-5 rate transition.

pue.notes: Power Usage Effectiveness. Liquid cooling required for B200-class TDP.

colocation.source: CBRE Data Center Report H2 2025 — wholesale primary US avg $195.94/kW/month for 250–500 kW deployments

depreciation.notes: Standard for GPU clusters; tax depreciation may differ.

utilization_thresholds.notes: Below 70% sustained utilization, cloud reserved typically wins on TCO at 24-month horizon.
